title: Tangy Silky Low-Calorie Saudi Dates Pilaf
description: A delectable date-night dish featuring tangy sauced saudi-style dates cooked with aromatic cumin and a touch of low-calorie-friendly ingredients for a refreshing meal.

ingredients.name: dates
ingredients.notes: Use seedless or lightly pit them to make it easier

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: For a low-calorie version, you can use coconut oil instead

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: To add more flavor and texture

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.amount: 1 tbsp fresh or 2 tsp lemon extract

ingredients.name: water or vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: For cooking and deglazing the pot

instructions: Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add olive oil, cumin seeds, garlic, and cook until fragrant and the seeds are lightly browned, about 1 minute.
Deglaze with lemon juice, then add water or vegetable broth. Stir well to remove any stuck bits from the bottom of the pan.
Fold in chopped dates, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer gently for about 10 minutes until the dates are soft and most of the liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt to taste and serve hot.
